title: Improvement Pass Record

threshold_result_before_improvement.reason: Dry-run scores are below threshold and reference/visual readiness remains incomplete.

source_improvement_priorities: Populate and verify at least two credible references.
Strengthen evidence alignment before factual integrity can pass.
Develop actual article prose from the revised preview section plan.
Prepare hero visual, structured visual/data unit, caption, alt text and image credit.
Improve trust and revisit value through verified references and stronger synthesis.

improvement_actions.source_gap: Reference readiness score is low because candidate URLs are not populated or verified.

improvement_actions.source_gap: Evidence burden is clear but factual support remains incomplete.
improvement_actions.improvement_instruction: Map claims to evidence slots before production packet candidacy.

improvement_actions.source_gap: Long-form section structure exists but actual prose is not generated.

improvement_actions.source_gap: Visual/data plan exists but no asset, caption, alt text, image credit or data-unit candidate exists.

improvement_actions.source_gap: Reader value direction exists but actionable payoff is not yet strong enough.
improvement_actions.improvement_instruction: Add reader takeaway prompts and trust/revisit-value checkpoints before production packet generation.

improvement_actions.source_gap: Static-live fields exist only as preview placeholders.
